events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: a reversed primary/secondary termination on a transformer is a **fail**, **critical risk** — it can cause step-up overvoltage on the load side, invalidates NEC Art. 450 overcurrent protection sizing, and voids the 250.30 grounding/bonding scheme for the separately derived system. Corrective action: lock out, correct terminations per nameplate/one-line, re-verify OCPD sizing and grounding, then re-inspect before energizing.
